meta.title: Venture Connect — Build Teams, Launch Projects
meta.description: The AI-powered business directory that helps you plan projects, find the right people, and build teams — globally.

landing.headline: Find the right people. Build the right team.
landing.subheadline: Venture Connect is the global business directory with an AI project planner that helps you scope ideas, discover talent, and assemble teams — all on one platform.

hero.dashboardSubtitle: Generate detailed project plans in seconds

features.title: Platform Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to go from idea to assembled team

aiPlanning.title: AI Project Planning
aiPlanning.description: Describe your idea and our GPT-4o agent creates a full project timeline — milestones, phases, tools, materials, and the exact roles you need to hire.

directory.title: Global Talent Directory
directory.description: Search 12,000+ verified professionals across 85 countries by skill, industry, availability, and rate. Real people, real profiles — no recruiters.

teamAssembly.title: Automated Team Assembly
teamAssembly.description: The AI matches your project requirements to directory profiles, sends confidential outreach, manages NDA signing, and builds your team — hands-free.

workspace.title: Secure Project Workspaces
workspace.description: Collaborate in private, invitation-only workspaces with milestone tracking, file sharing, threaded discussions, and real-time progress dashboards.

nda.title: Built-in NDA Workflow
nda.description: Project details stay confidential until candidates sign a legally binding NDA. No sensitive information is shared until you approve each team member.

meetings.title: Integrated Scheduling
meetings.description: Book physical, virtual, or hybrid meetings directly from any project workspace. Calendar sync, agenda sharing, and automated reminders included.

howItWorks.title: From idea to launch in four steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No job boards, no endless interviews — just describe what you need and let AI handle the rest.

step1.title: Describe your vision
step1.description: Tell our AI agent about your project. It asks smart follow-up questions to nail down scope, timeline, budget, and the exact skill-sets you need.

step2.title: Review your project plan
step2.description: The AI produces a structured timeline with phases, milestones, deliverables, resource needs, and estimated team composition — ready in seconds.

step3.title: AI finds and vets your team
step3.description: The agent searches the global directory for matching professionals, sends confidential outreach with NDAs, and ranks candidates by fit score.

step4.title: Launch and collaborate
step4.description: Approved members join your encrypted workspace. Track milestones, share files, hold meetings, and ship your project — all from one dashboard.

testimonials.title: Loved by teams worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: See what professionals are saying about Venture Connect

items.name: Elena Vasquez
items.quote: Venture Connect helped us assemble a world-class engineering team in 3 weeks. The AI planner nailed our project scope on the first try.

items.name: Raj Patel
items.quote: The NDA workflow alone saved us 40+ hours of legal back-and-forth. Now we onboard contractors in minutes, not weeks.

items.name: Sarah Lindström
items.quote: Finally, a platform that understands remote-first teams. The workspace tools keep everyone aligned across 4 time zones.

cta2.title: Ready to build something great?
cta2.subtitle: Join 12,000+ professionals who are finding teams and launching projects faster than ever.

ratings.title: Team Ratings

ratings.onlyLeader: Only the project leader can submit ratings. Ratings are based solely on successful project outcomes and cannot be self-assigned.

nda.declinedMessage: You've declined this NDA. The project creator has been notified.
nda.noInvitations: No invitations yet. Your profile will be discovered by project creators using AI team assembly.
nda.confidentialNotice: Full project details will be revealed after you sign the NDA.
nda.legalNotice: By signing, you agree to keep all project information confidential and not share it with third parties.
